description: Taking traditional designs and giving them a modern twist is what makes ice watches irresistible timepieces. The Stone Tycoon wrist watch is no exception. Contemporary and trendy, it& rsquo s an affordable timepiece, with an exquisite design that highlights your individuality. Case diameter: 40 mm Case thickness: 10 mm Dial shape: Round Warranty:2 Years Black solid polycarbonate case with fixed bezel for added durability, style and comfort Ice logo on the 12 hour mark Black silicone strap with a tang clasp for comfort Black dial with miniature jewels on the outer ring and dial Press to reset time and alarm Solid case back made of stainless steel for enhanced durability Water resistance up to 50 meters, allowing you to use it even when showering
